CHART 152
Sun In this chart Venus is well placed
J
Mars (though with Saturn) in Aquarius, as
·Mer. he gets exalted in the next house. Pi
Ven. Dt. sces is occupied by the Sun and Mer
Sat. cury and they are aspected by Jupiter.
Hence, the native will have full faith in
Dh. God and will be patient and charitable.
As Saturn is conjunct Venus and the
I
Jupt. Moon, the native will have financial
gains through the sale of drinks and
tasty things. As Mercury and Jupiter have exchange of places he will earn
good profits from his business. As Jupiter gets the power of his own house by
the exchange of places he blesses the native with long life.
As Jupiter is retrograde, on his entering Leo, he will aspect Saturn,
Venus and the Moon. Jupiter already aspects the Sun and Mars. Consequently,
two sisters and five brothers of the native will obtain rich positions in life.
Saturn's conjunction with the Moon indicates employment in a far off
